title: Mobs Always Drop
description: This is a very lightweight mod that makes all mobs drop their equipment like tools, weapons, armor & XP, regardless of cause of death.
body:
### <center>A lightweight mod that makes **every mob drop what they carry**.</center>

<center>Inspired by Better Than Wolves, it restores straightforward loot logic:  
if a mob had it, you can pick it up.</center>

---

## ⚔️ Overview
Mobs now drop their **equipped items** and **experience** when killed, including:
- Weapons  
- Tools  
- Armor  
- Offhand items  

---

## ⚙️ Features
- **Consistent Equipment Drops** – Every mob drops whatever it has equipped.  
- **Reliable XP** – Mobs always drop experience, regardless of cause of death.
---

## 🔧 Configuration (via Mod Menu)
Fine-tune the drop behavior:

### **Always Drop Equipment**
- Toggle whether mobs always drop their gear.

### **Always Drop XP**
- Toggle whether mobs always drop experience.

---

## 🧱 Acknowledgment
This mod ports functionality from the classic **Better Than Wolves** mod,  
originally created by **FlowerChild** and maintained by the **CE Team**.  
👉 [**Better Than Wolves Official Site**](https://btwce.com/)
